rule_text: All text is left-aligned — titles, headlines, subheads, body copy, and CTA button labels — regardless of background color. The CTA button sits left, flush with the left edge of the text block above it (not centered, not right-aligned).
intent: Maintain consistent left-aligned reading rhythm across all text and CTAs on every background.
summary: All text and CTA buttons are left-aligned; CTA buttons align flush with the left edge of the text block above, never centered or right-aligned.
